basic_details.job_title: NIT Raipur Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Temporary Faculty, Teaching Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Temporary Faculty / Teaching Assistant / Part-Time Faculty
basic_details.short_information: NIT Raipur is recruiting Temporary Faculty positions across 18 departments. Applications are invited through email only.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: No upper age limit specified
qualification.education_qualification: As per department-wise requirements (Ph.D. preferred, M.Tech/M.E./M.Sc./MCA/MA/B.Tech considered as per post)
qualification.experience: Desirable for Temporary Faculty & Part-Time positions

vacancy_details.details: Multiple positions are available in the following departments (exact number may vary): Applied Geology Architecture & Planning Bio Medical Engineering Bio-Technology Chemical Engineering Chemistry Civil Engineering Computer Science & Engineering Electrical Engineering Electronics & Communication Engineering Humanities & Social Sciences Information Technology Mathematics Computer Applications (MCA) Mechanical Engineering Metallurgical and Materials Engineering Mining Engineering Physics

how_to_apply: Download the prescribed application form from www.nitrr.ac.in.
Scan the filled form along with self-attested copies of all testimonials into a single PDF.
Send the PDF to the respective department email ID before 23/07/2026 (05:00 PM).
Subject line must be: “Application for the post of Temporary Faculty/ Teaching Assistant/ Part Time Faculty”.
Department-wise Email IDs are provided in the official notification.
important_instructions: Applications received after the deadline or in any other mode will not be considered. The contract is initially for one semester and extendable. Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email only. No interim enquiries will be entertained. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. The Institute reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process.

content_sections.heading: NIT Raipur Temporary Faculty Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: National Institute of Technology Raipur (An Institute of National Importance), G.E. Road, Raipur – 492010 (CG) has issued notification No. NITRR/Estt./Advt./2026/556 dated 15/07/2026 for engagement of Temporary Faculty / Teaching Assistant / Part-Time Faculty in various departments for the session 2026-27. The engagement is initially for one semester and extendable. Download NIT Raipur Temporary Faculty Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIT Raipur Temporary Faculty Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: NIT Raipur is recruiting Temporary Faculty positions across 18 departments. Applications are invited through email only.

rows.details: As per department-wise requirements (Ph.D. preferred, M.Tech/M.E./M.Sc./MCA/MA/B.Tech considered as per post)
Desirable for Temporary Faculty & Part-Time positions

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NIT Raipur Temporary Faculty 2026
content_sections.text: Download the prescribed application form from www.nitrr.ac.in . Fill the form (typed or handwritten). Scan the filled form along with self-attested copies of all testimonials into a single PDF. Send the PDF to the respective department email ID before 23/07/2026 (05:00 PM). Subject line must be: “Application for the post of Temporary Faculty/ Teaching Assistant/ Part Time Faculty”. Department-wise Email IDs are provided in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for NIT Raipur Temporary Faculty Candidates
content_sections.text: Applications received after the deadline or in any other mode will not be considered. The contract is initially for one semester and extendable. Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email only. No interim enquiries will be entertained. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. The Institute reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Raipur Temporary Faculty 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications through email is 23rd July 2026 (05:00 PM).

faq.question: Q2. How to apply for NIT Raipur Temporary Faculty positions?
faq.answer: Fill the prescribed form, attach self-attested documents in a single PDF, and email it to the respective department email ID mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Temporary Faculty at NIT Raipur?
faq.answer: Remuneration ranges from Rs. 50,000/- to Rs. 70,000/- per month (consolidated) depending on the post and qualification. Part-time faculty is paid per period with monthly ceiling.

faq.question: Q4. Which departments are hiring Temporary Faculty at NIT Raipur 2026?
faq.answer: 18 departments including CSE, Civil, Mechanical, ECE, IT, Biotechnology, Architecture, Mining, and others.

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential qualifications for NIT Raipur Teaching Assistant?
faq.answer: B.E./B.Tech./B.Arch./M.Sc./MCA/MA. Ph.D. or M.Tech. candidates are preferred.

faq.question: Q6. Is Ph.D. mandatory for Temporary Faculty at NIT Raipur?
faq.answer: Ph.D. is highly desirable. However, candidates with M.Tech/M.E./M.Arch. may be considered if suitable Ph.D. candidates are not available.

faq.question: Q7. What is the duration of engagement for NIT Raipur Temporary Faculty?
faq.answer: Initially for one semester, extendable up to the next semester based on performance.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the department-wise email IDs for NIT Raipur application?
faq.answer: Department-wise email IDs (e.g., [email protected]) are given in the official advertisement on www.nitrr.ac.in.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for NIT Raipur Temporary Faculty Recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is required.

faq.question: Q10. How will shortlisted candidates be informed for NIT Raipur interview?
faq.answer: Shortlisted candidates will be informed about the interview date and time (online or offline) through email only.
